instructions.name: cancel_order
docs: Cancel an Open order and return escrowed collateral to the owner.

accounts.name: order
docs: The Order PDA to cancel.
Constraint: caller must be the owner; order must be Open.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Escrow token account — drained then closed; rent returned to owner.

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's token account — receives the returned collateral.

accounts.name: owner
docs: The order owner; must sign; receives returned rent lamports.

instructions.name: create_order
docs: Create a Hedge or Cover order and lock collateral in a PDA escrow.

accounts.name: order
docs: The Order PDA: seeds = [b"order", owner, nonce].

accounts.name: escrow
docs: PDA token account holding the locked collateral.
seeds = [b"escrow", order]
authority = order (so the program can sign transfers during match/settle/cancel)

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's token account — collateral is pulled from here.

accounts.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint (USDC or SSTM).

accounts.name: owner
docs: The wallet creating the order; pays for account rent.

instructions.name: match_order
docs: Match a Hedge order with a compatible Cover order to create a live Contract.

accounts.name: contract
docs: The Contract PDA: seeds = [b"contract", hedge_order, cover_order].

accounts.name: contract_escrow
docs: Contract escrow: holds cover coverage until settlement.
seeds = [b"contract_escrow", contract]  authority = contract PDA

accounts.name: hedge_order
docs: Hedge order — must be Open, type Hedge, compatible with cover_order.

accounts.name: cover_order
docs: Cover order — must be Open, type Cover.

accounts.name: hedge_escrow
docs: Hedge escrow — holds the premium; transferred to the cover party at match.

accounts.name: cover_escrow
docs: Cover escrow — holds coverage collateral; moved to contract_escrow.

accounts.name: cover_owner_token_account
docs: Cover party's token account — receives the hedge premium at match time.

accounts.name: hedge_owner_token_account
docs: Hedge party's token account — recorded as payout destination if hedge wins.

accounts.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint (must match both orders).

accounts.name: matcher
docs: Wallet paying for the new Contract and contract_escrow accounts.

instructions.name: settle
docs: Oracle-signed instruction to settle a contract and pay out the winner.
Only the wallet at `constants::ORACLE_AUTHORITY` may call this.

accounts.name: contract
docs: The contract being settled.

accounts.name: contract_escrow
docs: Contract escrow — holds the coverage collateral to be paid to the winner.
seeds = [b"contract_escrow", contract]

accounts.name: winner_token_account
docs: Token account that receives the escrowed payout.
Must equal `contract.hedge_token_account` when outcome = 1 (hedge wins),
or `contract.cover_token_account` when outcome = 0 (cover wins).

accounts.name: oracle
docs: The oracle wallet signing this transaction.

errors.name: UnauthorizedOracle
errors.msg: Signer is not the authorized oracle

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: Invalid outcome — must be 0 (cover wins) or 1 (hedge wins)

errors.name: InvalidWinnerAccount
errors.msg: Winner token account does not match the recorded destination for this outcome

errors.name: OrderExpired
errors.msg: Order expiration must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Coverage amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: OrderNotOpen
errors.msg: Order is not in Open status

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not the order owner

errors.name: OrderTypeMismatch
errors.msg: Orders must be one Hedge and one Cover

errors.name: IndexMismatch
errors.msg: Orders have different index names or threshold levels

errors.name: DenominationMismatch
errors.msg: Orders have different denomination or mint

errors.name: AmountMismatch
errors.msg: Orders have different coverage or premium amounts

types.name: Contract
docs: On-chain state for a matched contract between a Hedge order and a Cover order.
Created by `match_order` when a Hedge and Cover are paired.
Settled by `settle` (oracle-signed) with outcome 0 or 1.

fields.name: hedge_order
docs: Pubkey of the hedge Order account.

fields.name: cover_order
docs: Pubkey of the cover Order account.

fields.name: hedge_token_account
docs: Token account that receives escrowed funds if the hedge party wins (outcome = 1).

fields.name: cover_token_account
docs: Token account that receives escrowed funds if the cover party wins (outcome = 0).

fields.name: expiration
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) after which the contract expires unsettled.

fields.name: outcome
docs: Settlement outcome.
None  = not yet settled.
Some(1) = hedge party wins (index threshold was crossed).
Some(0) = cover party wins (contract expired without threshold crossing).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for the Contract account — used to sign CPIs from this PDA.

fields.name: escrow_bump
docs: PDA bump for the contract escrow token account (seeds: [b"contract_escrow", contract]).
Stored so `settle` can reconstruct the escrow signer without extra accounts.

types.name: Denomination
docs: SPL token used to denominate the contract.

types.name: IndexName
docs: Space weather indices supported as contract triggers.

types.name: Order
docs: On-chain state for a hedge or cover order.
Created by `create_order`; paired with `match_order`; cancelled with `cancel_order`.
A PDA token escrow account (seeds: [b"escrow", order.key()]) holds the locked collateral.
Hedge orders lock `hedge_premium` in escrow.
Cover orders lock `coverage` in escrow.

fields.name: order_type
docs: Hedge or Cover.

fields.name: index_name
docs: Space weather index this order is based on.

fields.name: index_level
docs: Payout threshold stored as fixed-point ×100.
Examples: Kp 5.0 → 500; Dst -120 nT → -12000.

fields.name: denomination
docs: Token denomination (USDC or SSTM).

fields.name: coverage
docs: Maximum payout / collateral amount in token base units.
Hedge: receives this if the index threshold is crossed.
Cover: locks this as their payout obligation.

fields.name: hedge_premium
docs: Premium the hedge party pays to buy protection.
Locked in escrow for Hedge orders; received at match time by Cover party.

fields.name: expiration
docs: Unix timestamp after which this order can no longer be matched.

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that created this order.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint (USDC or SSTM mint address).

fields.name: status
docs: Current lifecycle status.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Client-supplied nonce — enables multiple open orders per owner.
Incorporated into the PDA seeds: [b"order", owner, nonce].

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for the Order account itself.

fields.name: escrow_bump
docs: PDA bump for the associated escrow token account (seeds: [b"escrow", order]).

types.name: OrderStatus
docs: Lifecycle state of an order.

types.name: OrderType
docs: Hedge = buying protection; Cover = selling protection (collecting premium).
